description: Create a fully-constrained 2D cross-section of a dovetail guide rail and extrude it to an 80mm depth. The profile must have a base width of 50mm, base height of 10mm, dovetail top width of 30mm, and a total height of 25mm, with the dovetail centered horizontally on the base. Save the final file to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/dovetail_rail.slvs.
